title: Bedrock Swamps
description: Adds huge mushrooms in Swamps, like Bedrock Edition
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e7728f1fc01d255223adc33027b282cee4542b.png)

## Description
Bedrock Swamps is a vanilla friendly datapack/mod that add a generation of huge mushrooms to the swamp biome for parity with Bedrock Edition

## Important notes
- Made and tested for 1.21.4+
- Huge Mushrooms generates with a frequency of 10% (similar to Bedrock)

## How it works
After the installation, your world will start to generate huge red/brown mushrooms in the swamp biome, only being able to generate on new chunks (really small tweak)

## See More:
[CURSEFORGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedrock-swamps)
